final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire start,
    output reg [31:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 32'b0;
        end else if (start) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
